homepage.description: Manage your lab bookings and explore available rooms with real-time status updates.
homepage.bookARoomDesc: Reserve available lab spaces in real-time

nextBooking.loadingMessage: Please wait while we fetch your details
nextBooking.noneMessage: You don't have any upcoming reservations
nextBooking.warning15: Your booking will end in less than 15 minutes. Please prepare to leave the room.
nextBooking.warning3: Your booking ends in less than 3 minutes! Please leave the room immediately.
nextBooking.pendingMessage: This booking is pending approval. You'll receive a confirmation email once it's approved. Cancellation may not be available during this stage.
nextBooking.cancelMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel this booking? This action cannot be undone.
nextBooking.successCheckIn: Successfully checked in to the room
